scripts.lint: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'venv\\Scripts\\ruff check .' : './venv/bin/ruff check .'; try { execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { process.exit(1); }"
scripts.format: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'venv\\Scripts\\ruff format .' : './venv/bin/ruff format .'; try { execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { process.exit(1); }"
scripts.test: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const cmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'venv\\Scripts\\python -m pytest' : './venv/bin/python -m pytest'; try { execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { process.exit(1); }"
